title: 君と分け合う焼きにんじん

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! ♪ Grilled carrot tastes so good after a
training sesh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Agreed! Nothing like having it fresh off the grill!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Agh, I dropped mine! I didn't even get a single
bite!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Well... we can always split mine! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's totally fine! I do this all the time with my
sisters!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Th-that's not the problem—I mean...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I just read this comic where two people fall in love
after sharing a carrot and... I dunno, it's a little
embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Then just don't think about that!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Come on... Here's your half.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay... Thanks a ton!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Those two always get along so well.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Like maximum Unity vibes well? Seeing those two
lovebirds together makes me swoon like wild!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? Like, if my carrot went flying all of
a sudden, I just know you'd keep yours to
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Whoa? Like, how'd you know that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Cause you're like an open book. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
And you're the Palmer of all Palmers! You know
me way too well!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: But that's why you're my bestie!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I'm glad to hear that. I adore how you're
so honest with your feelings.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Gwaaah! I just had a mini heart attack!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Word, word. ♪ Come on, let's make work of these
carrots before they cool down!
